Dashboard Archive: 2026-07-06 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum ranker shows two exceptionally strong performers at the top: MRNA ranks #1 with a composite score of 97.3, driven by massive returns (170% over 1 year, 67% over 1 month) and flawless technical setup across all four major moving averages, while maintaining extraordinary resilience on down SPY days (99.94 score). ATEX follows closely with similarly spectacular returns (323% annually, 386% over 6 months) and passes all consistency ratio gates, though its bad_spy_score of 2.08 versus MRNA's 5.91 suggests it shows more weakness during market downturns. Both tickers demonstrate the dashboard's core thesis: sustained momentum across multiple timeframes with proper SMA confirmation and outperformance versus SPY, QQQ, and gold (IAU). The data appears incomplete for ATEX's full correlation metrics, but both names display the hallmark of strong short-term momentum plays—consistent ratio progression and ability to weather broader market stress. These represent extreme outliers in the 700+ ticker universe, suggesting either sector tailwinds or company-specific catalysts driving sustained buying pressure.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
